title: Lines should not be too long
description: Excessively long lines make the code difficult to read and maintain.
message: Line is too long. Maximum line length is 120.
recommendation: Use wrapping or continuation to improve readability.

noncompliant.code: long_line_of_code = 'This is a very long line of code that exceeds the maximum length of 120 characters.'
noncompliant.description: Line exceeds the maximum length of 120 characters.

compliant.code: long_line_of_code = 'This is a line of code that is shorter than 120 characters.'
compliant.description: Line is shorter than the maximum length of 120 characters.

why_is_this_an_issue: Excessively long lines make the code difficult to read and maintain.
how_to_fix: Use wrapping or continuation to improve readability.

metadata.title: Lines should not be too long
